message:
feat(cli): wire audit, explain, install commands into fcp-cli

Integrate existing CLI command modules into main.rs:
- fcp audit tail: stream audit events with filtering
- fcp explain: render DecisionReceipt evidence
- fcp install: connector installation with verification

Also exports manifest signing helpers from fcp-registry:
- MANIFEST_SIGNATURE_CONTEXT (pub const)
- manifest_signing_bytes (pub fn)
- signature_message (pub fn)

All 59 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
